# SSH 错误示例
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 缺少 host → SSH_MISSING_PARAMS
# 编码前: {"user": "root", "password": "x", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "echo hi"}
aitk SSH_7b2275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a202278222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a20226563686f206869227d

# 缺少认证 → SSH_MISSING_AUTH
# 编码前: {"host": "1.2.3.4", "user": "root", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "echo hi"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022312e322e332e34222c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a20226563686f206869227d

# 未知 action → SSH_UNKNOWN_ACTION
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "invalid"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022696e76616c6964227d

# 双向同步+delete → SSH_SYNC_ERROR
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "bidirectional", "local_path": "/tmp/a", "remote_path": "/tmp/b", "recursive": true, "delete": true}
aitk SSH_

# 命令非零退出码（结果中 exit_code=2，不是错误）
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "ls /nonexistent"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a20226c73202f6e6f6e6578697374656e74227d
